purpose: Create CLAUDE.md bootstrap, implement friction closure library (F1/F3h), wire friction_form knob into 1D solver, submit gap analysis job, write Monday handoff journal.
scope: Salt 2/3/4 Jin closures; 1D model friction decomposition; coordination bootstrap for future Claude sessions.

submitted_jobs.3275531: jin_perleg_gap development queue — insulation sweep + per-leg friction diagnosis

key_findings.hagenbach_entry_correction: Explains 42-79% of upcomer excess f (short segment L=0.12m) but only 4-8% in heater/cooler (long segments L=0.35m).
key_findings.F3h_vs_F1_mdot: F3h reduces mdot 13-19% vs F1 (Salt 2-4). Moves in right direction but insufficient to close factor-2 gap.
key_findings.residual_gap: 2-3x gap in heated/cooled verticals after F3h is buoyancy-modified velocity profile, not entry length.
key_findings.FRIC_FIT_001_status: NOT implemented — target_value in training CSV is not standard Darcy f_D (values ~46 at Re~97, physically implausible). Do not use until normalization resolved.

open_questions_for_user: T6 blocker: Ethan needs to provide NCC parametric mesh generator or pre-built medium/fine polyMesh for Salt 2/4 Jin.
LitRev friction forms: please point to the specific LitRev section or provide correlation names for friction_closures.py.
F4 Ri correction target: confirm preferred Richardson-number correction form (Aicher & Martin, or other).
